message:
Unify string path on raw UTF-8, add fast iterator, cache column refs

- Add doc_read_column_str_raw (Zig): copies raw UTF-8 bytes via memcpy
  instead of SIMD UTF-8→UTF-16 conversion. Computes UTF-16 code unit
  offsets for correct JS String.slice. ~30% faster string columns.
- Add doc_read_string_raw (Zig): single-call raw UTF-8 string read,
  writes ptr+len to batch_buffer.
- Replace all JS string reads with TextDecoder('utf-8') on raw bytes.
  Remove utf16Decoder, utf16ToString, utf16BulkToString, readUtf16Result,
  docReadStringUtf16 and related dead type declarations.
- Fast custom iterator: for...of bypasses Proxy get trap entirely
  (1 Proxy call vs N), saving ~40ns per element.
- Cache column reference in getter closure, eliminating Map.get per access.

Results (1000 items × 5 props):
  for...of destructure: 1.15x (was 1.56x)
  for-index destructure: 1.20x (was 1.56x)
  for...of 3 nums: 0.78x (beats JSON.parse)
